'''shayozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tabiya|tabiya]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-y-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tabiya|tabiya]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shayozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæyezeth|shæyezeth]] || [[word:shæyezej|shæyezej]] || [[word:shæyezesh|shæyezesh]] || [[word:shæyeze|shæyeze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shayoyozoth|shayoyozoth]] || [[word:shayoyozoj|shayoyozoj]] || [[word:shayoyozosh|shayoyozosh]] || [[word:shayoyozo|shayoyozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shayozoth|shayozoth]] || [[word:shayozoj|shayozoj]] || [[word:shayozosh|shayozosh]] || [[word:shayozo|shayozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shayofzoth|shayofzoth]] || [[word:shayofzoj|shayofzoj]] || [[word:shayofzosh|shayofzosh]] || [[word:shayofzof|shayofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shayozotho|shayozotho]] || [[word:shayozojo|shayozojo]] || [[word:shayozosho|shayozosho]] || [[word:shayozoko|shayozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shayozoth|shayozoth]] || [[word:shayozoj|shayozoj]] || [[word:shayozosh|shayozosh]] || [[word:shayozo|shayozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shayozothol|shayozothol]] || [[word:shayozojol|shayozojol]] || [[word:shayozoshol|shayozoshol]] || [[word:shayozokol|shayozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shayozothotho|shayozothotho]] || [[word:shayozojojo|shayozojojo]] || [[word:shayozoshosho|shayozoshosho]] || [[word:shayozoko|shayozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shayozothon|shayozothon]] || [[word:shayozojon|shayozojon]] || [[word:shayozoshon|shayozoshon]] || [[word:shayozokon|shayozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shayozothoro|shayozothoro]] || [[word:shayozojoro|shayozojoro]] || [[word:shayozoshoro|shayozoshoro]] || [[word:shayozokoro|shayozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
